currency.description: The currency of the MonetaryAccountLight as an ISO 4217 formatted currency code.

description.description: The description of the MonetaryAccountLight. Defaults to 'bunq account'.

daily_limit.description: The daily spending limit Amount of the MonetaryAccountLight. Defaults to 1000 EUR. Currency must match the MonetaryAccountLight's currency. Limited to 10000 EUR.

avatar_uuid.description: The UUID of the Avatar of the MonetaryAccountLight.

status.description: The status of the MonetaryAccountLight. Can be: ACTIVE, BLOCKED, CANCELLED or PENDING_REOPEN

sub_status.description: The sub-status of the MonetaryAccountLight providing extra information regarding the status. Will be NONE for ACTIVE or PENDING_REOPEN, COMPLETELY or ONLY_ACCEPTING_INCOMING for BLOCKED and REDEMPTION_INVOLUNTARY, REDEMPTION_VOLUNTARY or PERMANENT for CANCELLED.

reason.description: The reason for voluntarily cancelling (closing) the MonetaryAccountBank, can only be OTHER.

reason_description.description: The optional free-form reason for voluntarily cancelling (closing) the MonetaryAccountBank. Can be any user provided message.

created.description: The timestamp of the MonetaryAccountLight's creation.

updated.description: The timestamp of the MonetaryAccountLight's last update.

balance.description: The current available balance Amount of the MonetaryAccountLight.

user_id.description: The id of the User who owns the MonetaryAccountLight.

balance_maximum.description: The maximum balance Amount of the MonetaryAccountLight.

budget_month_used.description: The amount of the monthly budget used.

budget_month_maximum.description: The total amount of the monthly budget.

budget_year_used.description: The amount of the yearly budget used.

budget_year_maximum.description: The total amount of the yearly budget.

budget_withdrawal_year_used.description: The amount of the yearly withdrawal budget used.

budget_withdrawal_year_maximum.description: The total amount of the yearly withdrawal budget.
